name: @page-context/mcp-bridge
description: Page Context MCP Bridge - relays extension context tools to MCP clients via stdio/SSE transport

scripts.test:firefox:e2e:realpage: FIREFOX_E2E_START_URL='https://unpkg.com/@page-context/example@0.0.1/dist/example.html' FIREFOX_MCP_EXPECTED_TOOL_SUFFIX='.page.getPageInfo' FIREFOX_MCP_TOOL_ARGS_JSON='{}' FIREFOX_MCP_EXPECTED_RESULT_JSON='{"title":"Page Context Bridge - Test Page","url":"example.html","itemCount":2}' node scripts/firefox-mcp-e2e.mjs
